1.title: Share the Love
1.description: This lovely badge was earned by users who shared their favorite Twitch clips in February 2025.

1.title: Turbo
1.description: A subscriber of Twitch's monthly premium user service

1.title: r/place 2023 Cake
1.description: A very delicious badge earned by watching Reddit's r/place 2023 event on Twitch Rivals or other participating channels.

1.title: Direct Relief - Charity 2018
1.description: Supported their favorite streamer during the 2018 Blizzard of Bits

message.body: This will be super mario world in 2026
gl whatever this is going to be
Time to find a room where you're not supposed to die and die there
what if you die in he death screen
but what if you die anyway, surely there's a way
does seem like the game doesn't want you to though
which really, just makes it more enticing
not sure how to die there though
did it say minute or minutes
would be hilarious if there was just a 999 ingame timer all along
This is the part where you read the disassembly
how many stars have we found
yeah i guess there are a lot more stars
i thought maybe it was just the 4 that were talked about but
ok but why do the munchers not have them then
i guess maybe that's just all there is to it then
Can you spring clip at the very left edge of the screen to the right of this
found a way back down i guess
unfortunate that there's no good way to go up at the spiny
otherwise the clip there would just work
The one where you just walk through the slope?
it's also used in vanilla speedruns right?
is it though or is the dirt solid?
yeah no i don't think i know that
but i guess i'll trust you on that
ok but 'more easily' does not mean 'in air' right?
the scrolling certainly made you die earlier but i didn't think you'd die if it wasn't solid
I wanna say 4 blocks when big
I was about to say this is a softlock but you can simply do the slope clip
with wall and corner clips being patches that seems difficult
time to find a yoshi a pipe and a powerup to eat to keep the springboard into the death room
yoshi does tend to solve a lot of problems
wdym this level is clearly at least one stream worth of content
must mean the level is very questionable
puzzle hack where you need to find the right emulator that can run it
uppipe boss but it's actually an up pipe
can't wait for him to drop pipes
I think i see why this won
yup, that's how i remember bowser going
Take on me port is the funny
didn't even change the fireworks into pipes
They don't even go home they just sit on top of bowser's castle
This was made over 2000 years ago
Don't make me look at that overworld again please
oh i think i saw a gif of this
I think it is a little questionable
Like gravity isn't supposed to do that
Why do the gray falling platforms look like that
there's a ? in the wall, pretty questionable
I guess because it's an actual puzzle
were there any rules on what questionable even entails
It's like you have some kind of lack of control
should've just submitted that again, that level was pretty questionable it seems
considering the rightwards slopes i'm guessing we'll lack the right button at some point too
Yeah I was thinking that too biob but this section looks awkward
That was a pretty funny chuck troll considering you can't even really get up there from the left without that vine glitch
what'd the message box say and did it change
ldadCritter ldadWhyarewemakingmore ldadBuity4 ldadBuity3 ldadBuity2 ldadBuity
Good thing he didn't raid when you were trying to die in fyre's entry for like 30 minutes
ldadCritter ldadCritter ldadCritter ldadCritter ldadCritter ldadCritter ldadCritter
Super mario flash 4 free mario game online ahh physics
oh so we have fangame physics now
well if you let go you no longer move
it does look very wrong tbf
this suddenly reminds me of all those kaizo: hard hacks with this
Mario's ascetic adventure but that's also old
I made a level with asceticism too but i canceled the hack so eh
i love how it has extremely low quality screenshots with the zsnes 'save loaded' text on it
It's probably to make the section less messy for the player
Not sure why they'd implement it like that tho
oh good we actually lack of control now
the fact that this one level is designed around So Many Questionable Gimmicks independently is... brilliant.
even mroe, the fact that untily ou know the gimmicks, it looks like a normal vanilla-tier level
Next room: this but you can only spin jump
now I'm waiting for perfect ice physics - NO slowdown unless you actively turn around
Inb4 it was in a previous room
should've put it in the other and hidden a p-switch as well
there's just a sprite killer there that prevents the chuck from jumping down
this has so much kuso potential
Too far up for the turn block bridge to spawn
but then one further up should've worked
Yeah you can tell from the goal
or do you just die then?
is it 16 tiles below where the top side glitch would take effect?
Mixing a custom item with vanilla glitches is clever
what the hell did they use that i made
Shoutouts to bees because they're awesome
How much of this rom is music wtf
i wonder if they had issues with beans spawning or if that text is just there because
glad they didn't patch out the p-switch music
You don't even have the ability to spawn fish
Sometimes we forget how good we have it to play as mario
what if bonking sends you back down
there better be a fish section
ah i'll have to check the vod of that
Yeah just about one hour and a half, quick play
you'll have quite a bit to watch
You need the vanilla cave music if you can even get it here
This does look a lot more difficult than the other rooms
Koopas if they spawned reznor or something
also can't tell if you're not saying anything anymore for the bit or if you're muted
The entry is so good he's speechlesd
i'm confused by this message, can you actually not hear me?
obs is good software i guess???
it did sound like you were cut off in the middle of saying something earlier
